title: LamQuant OpEvent
description: Wire format for events emitted by long-running LamQuant operations. All three UIs (Python TUI, Rust TUI, Tauri GUI) consume this format. The lml binary emits one JSON line per event when invoked with --emit-json-events. Schema parity is enforced by crates/lamquant-ops/tests/schema_parity.rs.

ts_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds at the point of emission. Wall-clock; not adjusted for skew.

op_id.description: Canonical op id from specs/ui-parity.md::Op IDs. Required for Started; optional on subsequent events but recommended for filtering.

total.description: Started: best-effort total work units (file count, byte count). Null if unknown ahead of time.

message.description: Progress: human-readable status text. Log: line content. Done: summary. Error: failure description.

path.description: FileDone: path to the file the op completed (success or failure).

success.description: FileDone: whether the file completed successfully.

cr.description: FileDone: compression ratio (output_bytes / input_bytes). Null when not applicable (verify, info).

ms.description: FileDone: wall-clock milliseconds the file took.

bytes_in.description: FileDone: original (uncompressed) byte size. Drives the dashboard throughput + saved-bytes display. Optional for backward compatibility.

bytes_out.description: FileDone: compressed output byte size. Drives the dashboard throughput + saved-bytes display. Optional.
